query: 101st Academy Awards 2029 exclusive broadcast rights winner

{"query":"101st Academy Awards 2029 exclusive broadcast rights winner","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1281,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"http://press.oscars.org/news/academy-partners-youtube-exclusive-global-rights-oscarsr-and-other-academy-content-starting","title":"THE ACADEMY PARTNERS WITH YOUTUBE FOR EXCLUSIVE GLOBAL RIGHTS TO THE OSCARS® AND OTHER ACADEMY CONTENT STARTING IN 2029 | Academy Press Office","content":"LOS ANGELES, CA – The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences and YouTube signed a multi-year deal that will give YouTube the exclusive global rights to the Oscars®, beginning in 2029 with the 101st Oscars ceremony and running through 2033.
This will include the Governors Awards, the Oscars Nominations Announcement, the Oscars Nominees Luncheon, the Student Academy Awards, the Scientific and Technical Awards, Academy member and filmmaker interviews, film education programs, podcasts, and more.
This includes the Academy Museum of Motion Pictures, the world's largest global film museum, the Academy Collection, the largest film-related collection in the world, and talent development programs for emerging artists."},{"url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/video/the-oscars-moving-to-streaming-on-youtube-in-2029-after-five-decades-on-broadcast-254621253851","title":"The Oscars moving to streaming on YouTube in 2029 after five decades on broadcast","content":"Inside the Academy Museum ahead of the 2026 Oscars
The Oscars moving to streaming on YouTube in 2029 after five decades on broadcast"},{"url":"https://deadline.com/2025/12/oscars-move-youtube-tv-rights-1236651363/","title":"Oscars: YouTube Wins TV Rights To Host Academy Awards","content":"Disney’s deal runs through 2028.
YouTube’s first show will be the 101st Oscars ceremony, and its deal will run through 2033, the Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences said Wednesday in announcing the deal.
“We are thrilled to enter into a multifaceted global partnership with YouTube to be the future home of the Oscars and our year-round Academy programming,” added Academy CEO Bill Kramer and Academy President Lynette Howell Taylor."},{"url":"https://www.cnbc.com/2025/12/17/youtube-stream-oscars-2029.html","title":"YouTube to stream the Oscars starting in 2029","content":"Currently, the Academy has a domestic and international partnerships with Disney to telecast events related to the awards ceremony.
The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences announced Wednesday it's signed a multiyear deal with the Google-owned service to stream the Oscars starting in 2029 and running through 2033.
The exclusive rights deal includes red carpet coverage, behind-the-scenes content and access to the Governors Ball in addition to the telecast.
It has an international partnership with Disney's Buena Vista International."},{"url":"https://www.nbcnews.com/business/media/youtube-oscars-academy-awards-2029-rcna249737","title":"Oscars moving to YouTube after ABC deal ends","content":"Dec 17, 2025 — The Academy Awards are moving to YouTube starting in 2029, 101st Oscars ceremony in 2029. The telecast has aired live on ABC since the 1970s.
The Academy Awards are moving to YouTube starting in 2029, marking a new era for Hollywood's leading awards show and a mainstay of network television for decades.
The ceremony — including red carpet coverage and behind-the-scenes programming — will be available live and for free to viewers around the world, as well as to YouTube TV subscribers in the United States, according to the academy."}]}
